entries.formulaBefore: maxDDpct was copied into both volatility and maximum drawdown
entries.formulaAfter: sample standard deviation (N-1) of annual portfolio returns, expressed in percent; no additional annualization factor
entries.expectedDirection: not monotonic; volatility and drawdown become independent risk measures

entries.formulaBefore: absolute count of successful years with cutPct >= 10, including accumulation years
entries.formulaAfter: completed decumulation years with finite cutPct >= 10 divided by completed decumulation years with a finite cut decision; denominator zero is nullable
entries.expectedDirection: unit and denominator change; old and new values are not directly comparable
